🎯 Opportunities

What am I looking at? — Opportunities explained
  • 🌟 Prime — Highest conviction setup. Stock is outperforming the market and sector on multiple timeframes with strong fundamentals. Best setups to research first.
  • ✅ Confirmed / Long Momentum — Most conditions are met. Strong relative strength with technical confirmation. Worth adding to your watchlist.
  • 📈 RS Leader / RS Buy — Positive relative strength vs market and sector. Early-stage momentum — watch for breakout confirmation.
  • Green = outperforming the market index. Red = underperforming. Gray = no clear direction.
  • Hover over any column header for a full description. See the full Signal Guide →

📊 All Stocks

What am I looking at? — All Stocks table explained
  • Signal_Label — Each stock is classified from 🌟 Prime (strongest) to 🔴 Avoid (weakest vs market). Focus on Prime and Confirmed first.
  • RS_22d_Idx% / RS_55d_Idx% — How much the stock has outperformed (+) or underperformed (−) the market index over 22 and 55 trading days.
  • SMA_Score — Count of moving averages (20/50/100/200-day) the stock is trading above. Score 4 = strongest uptrend.
  • Trend — Overall trend assessment: Strong Bullish → Bullish → Neutral → Bearish → Strong Bearish.
  • Hover over any column header for a full description. Use the search box to filter by sector, symbol, or score range (e.g. >60). Full Guide →

📚 Signal Guide & Reference

🌟 Triple Confirmed
RS30 + LST + MST all Buy. Highest conviction. All TFs aligned.
Weekly RS30>0, monthly RS12>0, daily RS55>0. Price > 20d swing high.
🌟 RS30 Leader
Weekly RS(30)>0 + EMA10>EMA30 + within 10% of 52W High + Sales QoQ≥15% + PAT QoQ≥15%.
TechnoFunda weekly momentum strategy. Breakout above 20-day swing high required.
🌟 Long Momentum
LST Buy + strong fundamentals (fin_score≥5). Monthly trend bullish. 60-120 day swing.
Monthly RS12>0, RSI12>50, Revenue+, PAT+. Weekly RS21>0 + ST + EMA200.
✅ Long Momentum
LST Buy. Monthly pre-conditions + weekly entry confirmed. 60-120 day swing.
Monthly RS12>0 + RSI12>50. Weekly RS21>0 + RSI12>50 + Supertrend + EMA200.
✅ Strong RS
All 5 peer filters: RS Buy + beats sector avg + beats industry avg + sector>0 + industry>0.
Four RS checks positive + stock outperforms peers on RS_55d.
📈 Swing Entry
MST Buy. Weekly pre-cond + daily entry + 20d breakout. 20-60 day swing.
Weekly RS21>0, RSI>50. Daily RS55>0, RSI>50, Supertrend=Buy, Close>EMA200, breakout.
📈 RS Leader
RS Buy: RS_22d>0 AND RS_55d>0 vs index AND sector. Awaiting TF confirmation.
Four RS checks positive: 22d-idx, 55d-idx, 22d-sec, 55d-sec.
👁 Watch
Pre-conditions met, no breakout yet. Wait for close above 20-day swing high.
RS30/LST/MST Watch: technical setup building, entry trigger not yet fired.
⬜ Neutral
Mixed RS signals. No clear direction. Monitor only.
🔴 RS Breakdown
All RS values negative. Stock lagging index and sector. Avoid or exit.
RS_22d_Idx<0 + RS_55d_Idx<0 + RS_22d_Sec<0 + RS_55d_Sec<0.

Score Formula

Total_ScoreRS_Score×0.6 + Fin_Score×2 + SL_Bonus
RS_ScoreRS_22d×35% + RS_55d×30% + RS_120d×20% + RS_252d×15%
Fin_ScoreSales_YoY≥15% +2 | PAT_YoY≥15% +2 | ROE≥15% +2 | Margin≥10% +1 | D/E<1 +1
EPSTrailing twelve-month Earnings Per Share (currency). Green = profitable, Red = loss-making.
SL_BonusA +4 | B +3 | C +2 | D +1 | R:R≥3× +2 | ≥2× +1

SL Grade

A ≤3%Ideal — tight stop
B ≤5%Good — MST
C ≤8%Acceptable — LST
F >12%Too wide — skip

📋 Run Summary & Methodology

FundaTechno Market Analysis v5.1 [INDIA]
Generated
10 June 2026 14:58 IST
Data Source
Yahoo Finance (yfinance)
Universe
500 stocks | Benchmark: NSE:NIFTY
── RS SIGNAL SUMMARY ──
⭐ Strong Buy (all 5 peer filters)
37
✅ Buy
203
🔴 Sell
246
⬜ Neutral
51
── MULTI-TF SIGNAL SUMMARY ──
MST Buy
12
MST Watch
114
LST Buy
23
LST Watch
88
RS30 Buy
4
RS30 Watch
115
── SL QUALITY (Buy stocks only) ──
Grade A ≤3% (Ideal)
24
Grade B 3-5% (Good)
23
Grade C 5-8% (Acceptable)
50
── RS SIGNAL METHODOLOGY ──
RS Formula
(Stock/Stock_22d) / (Benchmark/Benchmark_22d) - 1
Buy Signal
RS_22d_Idx>0 AND RS_55d_Idx>0 AND RS_22d_Sec>0 AND RS_55d_Sec>0
Sell Signal
All four RS values NEGATIVE
Neutral
Mixed RS or insufficient data
Strong Buy (5 filters)
Buy + Stock_Ret55≥Sec_Avg + Stock_Ret55≥Ind_Avg + Sec_RS>0 + Ind_RS>0
── MST: MEDIUM SWING TRADING (20-60 days) ──
Duration / Target / SL
20-60 days | 20-25% target | ≤7% SL | 2.5x R:R
HTF (Weekly) pre-cond
Weekly RS(21)>0 AND Weekly RSI(14)>50
Entry (Daily) cond
Daily RS(55)>0 AND Daily RSI(14)>50 AND Supertrend=Buy AND Close>EMA(200)
Breakout trigger
Close > Highest High of previous 20 days
Stop Loss
Swing Low of last 20 trading days (price action)
Exit signals
Daily RS(21)<0 OR Supertrend=Sell OR RSI>90 (partial exit)
── LST: LONG SWING / MOMENTUM (60-120+ days) ──
Duration / Target / SL
60-120+ days | 30%+ target | ≤12% SL | 3x R:R
HTF (Monthly) pre-cond
Monthly RS(12)>0 AND Monthly RSI(12)>50 AND Revenue+ AND PAT+
Entry (Weekly) cond
Weekly RS(21)>0 AND Weekly RSI(12)>50 AND Supertrend=Buy AND Close>EMA(200)
Breakout trigger
Weekly Close > 20-week Swing High
Stop Loss
Swing Low of last 20 days (wider, structure-based)
Exit signals
Daily RS(55)<0 OR Supertrend=Sell OR RSI>90 (partial exit)
── RS30: WEEKLY MOMENTUM (FundaTechno Strategy) ──
Technical filters
Weekly RS(30)>0 AND Weekly EMA(10)>EMA(30) AND Price within 10% of 52W High
Fundamental filters
Sales QoQ>15% AND PAT QoQ>15% AND MCap>1000Cr (India)
Breakout trigger
Close > 20-day Swing High
SL (short-term holders)
Price below Weekly EMA(10)
SL (long-term holders)
Price below Weekly EMA(30)
Avoid
High pledge, high debt, increasing retail shareholding
── SUPERTREND INDICATOR ──
Algorithm
ATR period=10, Multiplier=3.0 (matches Pine Script ta.supertrend)
Buy direction
Price crosses above lower band (direction=+1)
Sell direction
Price crosses below upper band (direction=-1)
Used in
MST entry filter + LST entry filter
── SL GRADE & SCORE BONUS ──
Grade A ≤3%
+4 pts to Total_Score (Ideal — very tight stop)
Grade B 3-5%
+3 pts to Total_Score (Good)
Grade C 5-8%
+2 pts to Total_Score (Acceptable for MST)
Grade D 8-12%
+1 pt to Total_Score (Acceptable for LST)
Grade F >12%
+0 pts (Too wide — avoid unless LST with strong conviction)
Total_Score formula
RS_Score×0.6 + Fin_Score×2 + SL_Bonus
